title: sorghastrum secundum
intro: Sorghastrum secundum, also known as yellow indiangrass, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sorghastrum secundum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Sorghastrum secundum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
